"...the grey and awful form of primal Nodens, Lord of the Great Abyss".

Nodens is a healing god from Celtic mythology, incorporated into the Mythos with Lovecraft’s short story "The Strange High House in the Mist". A god of the Dreamland and the master of the night-gaunts, a race of flying creatures. The Earth Gods fear the night-gaunts, yet Nodens is their master. Nodens associates with both Neptune and a void being called S'ngac, so he keeps odd company for a supposed god of the Earth.

Nodens is a lethal hunter of Nyarlathotep's minions, yet the "mild, feeble gods of earth" are depicted as being wardened by Nyarlathotep (interpretations from later authors).
